content_body: This house is beautiful inside, out, and all around! We had 8 people stay here, and it was a perfect fit! We loved waving at the passengers of the train that would go by—we even went and rode the train. The orchard down the road is a must see! Riding down to the orchard in the tractor to pick the apples was definitely an enjoyable experience—there were even baby pigs you could pet! Overall, we thoroughly enjoyed our trip and want to come back next year!
title: Beautiful inside, out, and all around!
